title: AI-Powered Smart Farming Assistant (Group Project)
short: An AI-based smart farming app with disease detection, crop recommendation, and predictive analytics using machine learning.
description: AI-Powered Smart Farming Assistant is a Flutter-based cross-platform application designed to help farmers make data-driven decisions using Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. The app provides crop disease detection using CNN, smart irrigation, fertilizer recommendation, crop recommendation, yield estimation, and market price forecasting through ML models. It integrates external APIs for real-time weather insights and uses Supabase for authentication and cloud data management. The system follows Clean Architecture principles, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and modular development. Additionally, an AI chatbot offers real-time assistance to farmers. This is a collaborative group project and is currently 90% completed.
features: Crop disease detection using CNN and image processing.
Smart irrigation system powered by machine learning.
Fertilizer recommendation based on soil nutrients (N, P, K, pH).
Crop recommendation system using classification models.
Crop yield estimation using regression models.
Market price forecasting using machine learning.
Real-time weather forecasting using external APIs.
AI chatbot for real-time farming assistance.
Secure authentication and cloud database using Supabase.
Scalable and modular design using Clean Architecture.

title: Finance Tracker — Manage Your Money Effortlessly
short: A personal finance management app built with Flutter to track income, expenses, and analytics.
description: Finance Tracker is a Flutter-based mobile application that helps users manage their daily finances efficiently. Users can add income and expenses, categorize transactions, view analytics (daily, monthly, yearly), track savings goals, and monitor spending habits through visual charts. The app stores all data locally, ensuring privacy and offline access.
features: Track income and expenses with flexible category management.
Visualize daily, monthly, and yearly analytics with charts.
Set savings goals and monitor spending habits offline.

title: NamidVault — Secure Document Vault App (Client Project)
short: Secure PDF storage app with expiry tracking, push notifications, and Emergency Access feature.
description: Client Project: Built a secure PDF storage and document vault application. Implemented expiry date tracking with push notifications, Emergency Access feature for urgent retrieval, and developed a clean, modern UI from scratch. Integrated Firebase Auth and Firestore with strong structural design. Delivered bug-free final product using Clean Architecture and GetIt DI.

title: DeenHub App
short: All-in-one Islamic app with 35k+ Hadith, prayer times, daily duas, Tasbih counter, Hijri calendar, and 99 Names of Allah.
description: Group Project (January 2025 - March 2025): DeenHub is an all-in-one Islamic app offering 35,000+ Hadith, location-based prayer times, daily duas, a Tasbih counter, Hijri calendar, and more. Users can bookmark Hadiths, track dhikr, and explore the 99 Names of Allah to enhance their spiritual journey. Available on Google Play Store. Developed key features: Hadith collection, 6 Dhikr Tasbih counter, and location-based prayer times. Implemented Clean Architecture and used Flutter Bloc for state management. Integrated GetIt for dependency injection, improving maintainability and scalability. Used SQLite (Floor package) for local data storage and optimized database queries. Implemented SharedPreferences to store Tasbih progress and last location for prayer times. Managed HUAWEI AppGallery & Amazon Appstore, handling compliance, updates, and app maintenance.
features: Browse 35,000+ Hadith with bookmarking support.
Access prayer times based on user location.
Use Tasbih counter, Hijri calendar, and daily duas in one app.

title: English Booster
short: Vocabulary learning app with swipe cards, spaced repetition, and progress tracking.
description: Vocabulary learning app with swipe cards, spaced repetition, and progress tracking. Uses SQLite for offline data and Flutter Bloc for scalable state management.
features: Practice words with swipe-based flashcards.
Improve retention using spaced repetition.
Track learning progress with offline-first storage.

title: Secure File Vault — Encrypted Document Storage
short: A secure Flutter app for encrypted file storage using custom Snake Matrix XOR encryption.
description: Secure File Vault is a Flutter-based application designed for secure document storage with end-to-end encryption. Files are encrypted locally using a custom Snake Matrix XOR algorithm with a randomly generated key, which is further secured using RSA encryption. The app integrates Firebase for authentication, storage, and metadata management, while ensuring all files remain encrypted before upload. ZLib compression is used to optimize performance, and Flutter Isolates handle heavy processing to keep the UI smooth. The project focuses on privacy, performance, and scalable architecture.
features: End-to-end file encryption before upload
Custom Snake Matrix XOR encryption algorithm
RSA-based secure key encryption
Firebase Authentication (Google Sign-In)
Secure file storage with Firebase Storage
Metadata management using Firestore
ZLib compression for optimized performance
Secure key storage using Flutter SecureStorage
Support for multiple file types (PDF, images, etc.)
Smooth performance using Flutter Isolates

title: Flutter News App
short: A fully functional news application with REST API, Firebase Auth, SQLite offline storage, and Clean Architecture.
description: Project (January 2024 - March 2024): A fully functional news application developed using Flutter, integrating a REST API, Firebase Authentication, SQLite offline storage, Flutter Bloc, and Clean Architecture for maintainable and scalable code. Features include: Real-Time News Feed fetching articles from a RESTful API, Firebase Authentication for secure login, Offline Support with SQLite (automatically saves fetched news articles and displays them when offline), State Management using Flutter Bloc for predictable state handling, Clean Architecture with domain, data, and presentation layers for scalable and testable codebase, and Dark Mode Support with seamless theme switching.
features: Fetch and display real-time news from a REST API.
Provide secure login with Firebase Authentication.
Support offline reading with SQLite article caching.
